description: You are a urologist reviewing a CT urogram for a patient with right flank pain and microscopic hematuria. The referring physician suspects a renal mass and has asked you to assess kidney dimensions before the nephrology consultation. Using the CT series at /home/ga/DICOM/studies/ct_urogram/, measure the craniocaudal (longest) axis of the right kidney in the coronal plane. Export the coronal view with the measurement visible to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/mpr_renal.png. Write a brief report to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/renal_report.txt that includes the measured kidney length in millimeters and your assessment of whether the size is within normal limits.

metadata.clinical_scenario: CT urogram - renal dimension measurement with MPR
